sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No.5 to 9 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For order on CMA No. 302/2018 2. For orders on office objection Nos. 4, 19 and 21 3. For hearing of Main Case 30.01.2026 None present Prima facie these are time barred reference applications pending since 2018. On 12.11.2020, question was framed directing the learned counsel for the Applicant to explain the delay of 3125 days. Be that as it may, the department has not addressed the issue and matter remained pending in the docket without any progress for 8 years. Today once again, the Applicant remained unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the Applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported in PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Office to place a copy of this order in connected reference applications. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of the Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad PS
